'''yaworo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iberiotoxin|iberiotoxin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iberiotoxin|iberiotoxin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yaworo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæwereth|yæwereth]] || [[word:yæwerej|yæwerej]] || [[word:yæweresh|yæweresh]] || [[word:yæwere|yæwere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yawoworoth|yawoworoth]] || [[word:yawoworoj|yawoworoj]] || [[word:yawoworosh|yawoworosh]] || [[word:yawoworo|yawoworo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yaworoth|yaworoth]] || [[word:yaworoj|yaworoj]] || [[word:yaworosh|yaworosh]] || [[word:yaworo|yaworo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yawofroth|yawofroth]] || [[word:yawofroj|yawofroj]] || [[word:yawofrosh|yawofrosh]] || [[word:yawofrof|yawofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yaworotho|yaworotho]] || [[word:yaworojo|yaworojo]] || [[word:yaworosho|yaworosho]] || [[word:yaworoko|yaworoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yaworoth|yaworoth]] || [[word:yaworoj|yaworoj]] || [[word:yaworosh|yaworosh]] || [[word:yaworo|yaworo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yaworothol|yaworothol]] || [[word:yaworojol|yaworojol]] || [[word:yaworoshol|yaworoshol]] || [[word:yaworokol|yaworokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yaworothotho|yaworothotho]] || [[word:yaworojojo|yaworojojo]] || [[word:yaworoshosho|yaworoshosho]] || [[word:yaworoko|yaworoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yaworothon|yaworothon]] || [[word:yaworojon|yaworojon]] || [[word:yaworoshon|yaworoshon]] || [[word:yaworokon|yaworokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yaworothoro|yaworothoro]] || [[word:yaworojoro|yaworojoro]] || [[word:yaworoshoro|yaworoshoro]] || [[word:yaworokoro|yaworokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
